title: MiguelEconomy
description: Server-friendly economy with an Auction House and player shops. Easy to set up and highly configurable.
body:
# MiguelEconomy

A lightweight and easy-to-use economy mod for Minecraft servers.  
MiguelEconomy adds player balances, money commands, shops, an auction house, daily rewards, jobs, and Discord logging support.

Presentation video, French only for now:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/egI06FDzULc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## Features

### Economy System

- Persistent player balances
- Starting balance for new players
- Physical money item
- Player commands: /balance, /bal, /pay, /baltop
- Admin commands to set, add, and give money
- Daily rewards with /daily
- Jobs system with 4 jobs:
  - Miner
  - Hunter
  - Farmer
  - Trader
- Jobs menu available with /job or /jobs

---

### Shops

- Server shop system
- Custom shop categories
- Custom buy and sell prices
- Custom item quantities
- Console logs for shop transactions
- Support for configurable shop files

Build shops easily using the web builder:

https://miguel-economy-builder.vercel.app/

Shop Builder

---

### Auction House

- Player-to-player item trading
- List items for sale with a fixed price
- Buy items from other players
- Search auction listings
- Server-wide auction messages
- Chat notifications for listings, purchases, and sales

---

### Discord Webhooks

MiguelEconomy can send Discord webhook messages for economy activity such as:

- Auction listings
- Auction sales
- Auction cancellations
- Shop purchases
- Shop sales

---

## Version Support

| Version | Loader | Minecraft | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Fabric 1.20.1 | Fabric | 1.20.1 | Supported |
| Fabric 1.21.1 | Fabric | 1.21.1 | Supported |
| Fabric 1.21.11 | Fabric | 1.21.11 | Supported |
| Forge 1.20.1 | Forge | 1.20.1 | Supported |
| NeoForge 1.21.1 | NeoForge | 1.21.1 | Supported |

---

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| /balance or /bal | Check your balance |
| /pay | Send money to another player |
| /baltop | View the richest online players |
| /daily | Claim your daily reward |
| /job or /jobs | Open the jobs menu |
| /shop | Open the server shop |
| /ah | Open the auction house |

---

## Support

Need help or want to report a problem?

Discord: miguel.cuba  
You can also join the Discord server.

## Main differences

- **Forge 1.20.1** is the most complete version overall.
- **Fabric 1.21.1** is the best Fabric version for most servers.
- **Fabric 1.21.11** supports newer Minecraft but has some missing polish, especially around Trader jobs and chat prefixes.
- **NeoForge 1.21.1** works for NeoForge servers but has weaker balance config support.
- **Fabric 1.20.1** is mainly useful for older Fabric 1.20.1 servers.

## Shared features

All versions include economy balances, money items, daily rewards, death penalty option, player payments, Auction House, Shop, Jobs, scoreboard support, and Discord webhooks.
